title: Software Engineer II - Backend focused (Experiences)
score_reasoning: Your backend expertise in Python and Go aligns well with Tripadvisor's microservices and distributed systems focus, but the role's primary requirement for a statically typed language (Java, C#, or C++) is a notable gap—you have no commercial experience in these languages. The Software Engineer II title matches your mid-to-senior trajectory, though the hybrid Lisbon location with mandatory 2-hour commute distance creates significant friction against your remote-first preference and Berlin base (timezone overlap is reasonable at ~1h, but on-site frequency is not clearly defined and the location is outside your acceptable regions). The role offers solid growth in a high-scale travel platform with AWS infrastructure and modern practices (Kubernetes, daily releases), but the language requirement and location constraints combine to lower overall fit. This is a medium-priority role that merits exploration only if you're willing to relocate or commit to regular Lisbon office time.

red_flags: Primary tech stack requires Java/C#/C++ expertise—you lack commercial experience in statically typed OOP languages
Hybrid role anchored to Lisbon (2+ hour commute requirement)—conflicts with your remote-first preference and Berlin base location
On-site frequency not clearly defined; described as 'remote-first with periodic in-person gatherings' but commute distance requirement suggests regular on-site presence expected
Europe/UK/Switzerland region preference matched, but Lisbon is outside your typical target (Portugal is acceptable but not strongly signaled)
